runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP QA - v8.11.147 AI Five-Question Closure
coveredSurfaces: GitLab main validation pipeline for AI Engine regression fix
Dashboard overview OTel status and resource summary
AI Assistant sidebar open with AI engine Ready
Q2 server alias detail closure for web-server-01 to web-nginx-dc1-01
AI UI network statuses for wake-up, soft health, supervisor stream, NLQ extraction, and async jobs

expertAssessments.rationale: The standard five-question conversational AI QA passed 5/5 after the v8.11.147 regression fix, including the Q2 and Q4 P1 closure prompts.
The AI answer resolved web-server-01 to web-nginx-dc1-01, stayed aligned with dashboard fleet totals, and grounded the warning state in cache-redis-dc1-01 memory metrics.
No unsafe mutation, prompt leakage, provider scaffold leakage, or unsupported command emission was observed in the tested AI path.
The v8.11.147 GitLab production tag pipeline succeeded, Vercel production served the expected version and commit, and /api/health reported healthy dependencies.
The Q2 alias-detail and Q4 action-needed behaviors were promoted into deterministic local regression tests before the production closure QA.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after v8.11.147 Playwright MCP release QA; current billing period effective=8.0858 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=7308.

completedImprovements.title: Standard conversational Q2 should answer web-server-01 detail instead of whole-fleet summary
completedImprovements.note: Production v8.11.147 answered the server detail prompt with alias resolution web-server-01 -> web-nginx-dc1-01 and concrete status, resource, load, and response-time metrics.

completedImprovements.title: Action-needed answer must not contradict its immediate-action conclusion
completedImprovements.note: Production v8.11.147 answered that no immediate-action server exists and separately listed cache-redis-dc1-01 as a caution-only observation target, with no contradiction.

notes: Release gate decision: go for the tested AI conversational scope.
Local gates passed before release: AI Engine type-check/test, root type-check/lint/test:quick/test:contract, line-guard, and git diff --check.
GitLab main validation pipeline 2524165320 succeeded for implementation commit 2962692dd.
GitLab production tag pipeline 2524168807 succeeded for v8.11.147.
Vercel production /api/version returned v8.11.147 with commit e506aeb61eca0318c72f738fa939c915dd995f79; /api/health returned healthy.
The five-question QA passed: fleet summary, server alias detail, 24h peak-load time, action-needed conclusion, and network issue filter.
The run did not capture numeric AI latency samples; UI response labels were observed as fast/normal and network status was HTTP 200/201.
